# SOLUTIONS

### [Plan ![Plan use case](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fheaders%2Fuse-cases-xray%2Fplan-card.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b) Build schedules and operating plans that use limited resources efficiently. 9 USE CASES ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/plan)
### [Move ![Move use case](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fheaders%2Fuse-cases-xray%2Fmove-card.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b) Optimize how things flow through networks—people, products, data, or vehicles. 6 USE CASES ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/move)
### [Choose ![Choose use case](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fheaders%2Fuse-cases-xray%2Fchoose-card.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b) Pick the best mix of decisions under tradeoffs (cost, performance, risk, constraints). 6 USE CASES ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/choose)
### [Predict ![Predict use case](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fheaders%2Fuse-cases-xray%2Fpredict-card.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b) Forecast outcomes and detect signals so decisions are informed (not guessed). 2 USE CASES ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/predict)
### [Simulate ![Simulate use case](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fheaders%2Fuse-cases-xray%2Fsimulate-card.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b) Run "what-if" scenarios to understand consequences before acting. 1 USE CASES ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/simulate)
### [Adapt ![Adapt use case](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fheaders%2Fuse-cases-xray%2Fadapt-card.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b) Make better decisions repeatedly as the world changes in real time. 6 USE CASES ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/adapt)
### [Validate ![Validate use case](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fheaders%2Fuse-cases-xray%2Fvalidate-card.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b) Answer "can this work at all?" and find a viable plan that meets requirements. 1 USE CASES ](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases/validate)

SOLUTIONS
BY USE CASE

Seven problem types solved with optimization, quantum, and quantum-inspired techniques. From planning and routing to simulation and prediction, find the approach that fits your challenge.

Plan

Build schedules and operating plans that use limited resources efficiently.

9 USE CASES

Optimize how things flow through networks—people, products, data, or vehicles.

6 USE CASES

Pick the best mix of decisions under tradeoffs (cost, performance, risk, constraints).

6 USE CASES

2 USE CASES

Make better decisions repeatedly as the world changes in real time.
